name: Government Medical College Sirohi
address: Village kolar, tehsil shivganj, shivganj road Sirohi - 307001 Rajasthan, India

scholarships.name: NSP (PM-USP) Yojana
scholarships.eligibility: 80% in Class 12, AICTE recognized UG/PG courses, parental income ≤ ₹4.5 Lakhs, Must be in a regular course, maintain 50% marks and 75% attendance

scholarships.name: National Scholarship for Postgraduate Studies (UGC)
scholarships.eligibility: First-time PG students under 30 in UGC-recognized full-time programs
